subcodes.first_line: O fragrances of God, pass ye with musk-laden breeze over the sacred soil wherein reposeth one who turned unto God and returned unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایا نفحات الله مری معنبره معطره لارض ثوی فیها من توجه الی الله و رجع الی الله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @eulogies; reminiscences, @martyrs and martyrdom, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
